events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess described field condition. But user gave no actual photos, only scenario: progress photos show current checkpoint scope finished for area, remaining visible work cleanup/labeling/follow-on finish outside checkpoint. Stage rough-complete. Reference ACI 347. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no evidence of defects, and scope finished, likely pass. But we must be careful: form build & bracing residential, ACI 347. No component conditions flagged. We need produce JSON with fields. Need include findings maybe none. Actions maybe none. Rationale: no visible defects, work appears complete and consistent with ACI 347. Risk low. percent_complete maybe 90? Since rough-complete and remaining cleanup. value 0. confidence maybe 0.8 due to no photos? But we can assess from description. Since scenario says current checkpoint scope finished, remaining visible work is cleanup etc. So pass. Need ensure no prose outside JSON.
